title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Perospero, Unknown person #9, Katakuri, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Reiju as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Perospero
dialogue.text: Candy Wall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pero- Spero!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pero- Rin~)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ahh... Betrayal stings.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you were working with the germa, too, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Bruce your- selves, you bastards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll just shoot you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: From another angle, till I'm outta lead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell was that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All cannons, throughout the castle appear to be...

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Stuffed with Mochi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We cannot fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Dog- tooth!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: understood! I've got my own bad news for the whole building...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Father's arms and legs have been trapped in candy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We can't move a muscle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're surrounded by the pirate crew of the yonkou big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're being pressured into an utterly hope- less situation! We're under siege!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The moment any of them step foot outside, they'll be dead where they stand.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They sure did make the most of you, Bruce...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I- I'm a victim here! Brother!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Beat them up already! Every last one of them!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: poison? That woman's some trouble, indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're amazing, Beeee! I didn't know you could turn into such a huge castle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This ain't the time to be singin' and Dancin'! Look around you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it all... our assassination plot, one whole year in the making, went up in smoke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the first time I've mucked up an assassin- nation...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 28 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
